query:
SELECT 
  pv.id, 
  pv.variantCode, 
  pv.variantName,
  pv.variantType,
  pv.customerId,
  c.companyName as direct_customer_name
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN companies c ON pv.customerId = c.id
WHERE pv.variantCode LIKE 'DC-001-GRY%'
ORDER BY pv.id
